about.title: Local Expertise,
about.paragraph1: At Vicking Solar, we are a team of experts based in the Democratic Republic of Congo, specialized in solar energy solutions. We combine our local knowledge with the most advanced technologies to transform Congo's energy landscape.
about.paragraph2: Our methodology is based on a personalized approach — we analyze your specific needs, propose tailored solutions and ensure rigorous follow-up of each installation.

story.title: Who We
story.description: Since our creation, Vicking Solar has established itself as a key player in solar energy in the DRC.
story.mission: Our mission is clear: to make solar energy accessible, reliable and sustainable for every Congolese home, business and industry.
story.vision: We envision a Congo where clean energy is the norm, not a luxury.

team.title: The Leadership Team
team.subtitle: Passionate experts who care about Congo's future with intelligence.

expertise.title: Our Technical Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Mastery of the entire solar value chain to deliver the best results, to the highest standards.

cta.title: Want to know more?
cta.description: Contact us today to discuss your solar project.

innovation.desc1: Democratizing access to clean and reliable energy for every Congolese household and business through innovative and accessible solar solutions.
innovation.desc2: We are committed to reducing our clients carbon footprint while contributing to local economic development and the creation of green jobs in the DRC.
innovation.desc3: Founded in Kinshasa, Vicking Solar was born from a simple vision: to offer Congo reliable, clean and accessible energy for all.
innovation.desc4: Democratizing access to solar energy in the DRC by offering innovative, reliable solutions adapted to local realities.

servicesItems.title: Solar Panel Installation
servicesItems.description: Turnkey installation of photovoltaic systems for homes, businesses and industries. High-performance panels and quality inverters.

servicesItems.title: Hybrid Systems & Storage
servicesItems.description: Hybrid solutions with storage batteries for reliable power supply, 24/7, even without sunlight.

servicesItems.title: Maintenance & Repair
servicesItems.description: Preventive and corrective maintenance services to optimize the performance of your solar installation.

servicesItems.title: Industrial Systems
servicesItems.description: Large photovoltaic installations for industrial sites, enabling substantial energy savings.

servicesItems.title: Residential Solutions
servicesItems.description: Solar packs adapted to Congolese households to reduce electricity bills and gain energy independence.

servicesItems.title: Audit & Consulting
servicesItems.description: Complete analysis of your energy consumption and personalized recommendations to optimize your installation.

processSteps.title: Needs Analysis
processSteps.description: Free on-site visit and complete energy audit of your existing installation. Identification of your consumption and objectives.

processSteps.title: Technical Study
processSteps.description: Precise system sizing, equipment selection, installation plans and detailed quote provided within 48h.

processSteps.title: Installation
processSteps.description: Deployment by our certified technicians. Panel mounting, wiring, electrical protection and inverter integration according to IEC standards.

processSteps.title: Commissioning
processSteps.description: Complete system tests, monitoring configuration, user training and delivery of compliance folder with certificates.

processSteps.title: Ongoing Maintenance
processSteps.description: Remote monitoring via our IoT platform, scheduled preventive visits and telephone support 7 days a week to guarantee your performance.

benefits.title: After-Sales Service
benefits.description: Rigorous customer follow-up and a technical team available 7 days a week for total peace of mind.

benefits.title: Fast Installation
benefits.description: Record installation times thanks to our experienced team and optimized processes.

loginExtra.tagline: Your partner in sustainable solar energy

faq.question: How does a solar system installation work?
faq.answer: We start with a site visit to assess your energy needs. Then we provide a detailed quote. Once accepted, our expert team installs certified equipment and performs rigorous testing before commissioning.

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer preventive and corrective maintenance contracts. This includes panel cleaning, inverter and battery checks, to ensure the longevity and performance of your installation.

faq.question: Are quotes free of charge?
faq.answer: Our initial studies and quotes are completely free. We analyze your electricity bill or equipment to propose the most suitable solution with no obligation.

faq.question: What warranties do your equipment have?
faq.answer: We work with the best brands. Our solar panels are typically warranted for 25 years on performance, and inverters/batteries have a 5 to 10 year manufacturer warranty depending on the model.

faq.question: What is a hybrid system?
faq.answer: A hybrid system combines solar energy, the public electricity grid (SNEL) and/or a generator. It intelligently manages power outages and optimizes solar energy use to reduce your bill while ensuring continuous power supply.
